title: Creation DFY
hook: A premium DFY service funnel built to convert leads who want hands-on creation, setup, and business-building help without doing everything themselves.
sections: Main sales page, application path, affiliate page, thank-you flow, and referral-aware logic.
Sells the outcome of getting digital creation and implementation done for the buyer, not just advice.
Service positioning, apply flow, affiliate/referral support, polished copy, and site closer integration.
Founders, entrepreneurs, and creators who want execution help and faster progress without a full in-house team.
Traffic -> authority page -> apply / affiliate path -> consultative sale -> onboarding and delivery.
Tighten domain setup, add richer proof, and deepen referral attribution and backend CRM logic.
